creator: ben@remoteinformation.com.au
text:
G'day, this solution from Tomek helped me :

pc# cd  /usr/ports/print/ghostscript8/work/ghostscript-8.64/epag-3.09/  =
&&
make

then

pc# cd /usr/ports/print/ghostscript8/ && make install clean


Please note that my turning off of hardware printers was based on best =
guess =3D maybe there is something in there still on which requires the =
epag Epson Generic printer...?

cheers

Ben

freebsd# make showconfig
